Scheduling Portal

Begin your healing journey

Practice Disclosures

Session Rates

Individual sessions are billed at $180 (50 min). Couples counseling sessions are billed at $220 (75 min).

Insurance Navigation

We operate as an Out-of-Network provider. A monthly Superbill will be generated for your insurance reimbursement.

Cancellation Policy

To avoid cancellation charges, please reschedule or cancel your session at least 24 hours prior to the slot.

HIPAA Protection

All digital bookings, intakes, notes, and telehealth rooms comply strictly with federal HIPAA security rules.

Need custom timing or priority scheduling? Contact the office directly at hello@challascounsel.com.

Challa's Counsel will review your requested session and respond within 24 hours to confirm. A confirmation email with your Google Meet link has been sent.
